name: Tether USD Bridged Wormhole
description:
USDTR - Tether USD Bridged Wormhole is Designed to Facilitate Seamless Transactions, DeFi Participation and Ecosystem Development, with a Focus on Accessibility, Transparency and Community Engagement. 

USDTR - Tether USD Bridged Wormhole is a BEP20 Token Deployed on the BNB Smart Chain, Leveraging its High throughput, Low Transaction Costs, and Robust Infrastructure. With a Decimal Precision of 18, USDTR Ensures Compatibility with BSC Wallets, Decentralized Applications (DApp), and Decentralized Exchanges (DEX) Like PancakeSwap. Pegged to USD at $1 per USDTR, Ensuring Price stability for Transactions and DeFi use Cases.

USDTR - Tether USD Bridged Wormhole Aims to Empower Users within the BNB Smart Chain Ecosystem by Providing a Stable, Low-Cost, and Interoperable Digital Asset. USDTR is Designed to Facilitate Seamless Transactions, DeFi Participation, and Ecosystem Development, with a Focus on Accessibility, Transparency, and Community Engagement.
